info.title: AI Agents API
info.description: API for configuring and invoking AI agents in epilot platform

tags.name: Agent Execution
tags.description: Execute AI agents and manage executions

post.description: Creates a new custom agent. System skills cannot be created via this endpoint.

get.description:
Lists agents from both system skills and custom agents.
Use query parameters to filter by source, availability, or entity schema.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Filter by agent source (system = pre-built skills, custom = user-created)

parameters.name: entity_schema
parameters.description: Filter by allowed entity schema (e.g., "message" for email-related skills)

get.summary: Get the agent configuration by ID
get.description:
Retrieves an agent by ID. Supports both:
- System skill IDs (prefixed): "skill:email-categorizer"
- Custom agent IDs (UUID): "0336a235-9417-4dd8-894c-fe81285bba75"

put.summary: Update the agent configuration by ID
put.description: Updates a custom agent. System skills cannot be updated via this endpoint.

delete.summary: Delete the agent configuration by ID
delete.description: Deletes a custom agent. System skills cannot be deleted via this endpoint.

post.description:
Executes an agent (system skill or custom agent).
Supports both:
- System skill IDs (prefixed): "skill:email-categorizer"
- Custom agent IDs (UUID): "0336a235-9417-4dd8-894c-fe81285bba75"

post.summary: Execute an agent with streaming response
post.description:
Executes an agent with real-time streaming of tokens and tool events.
Returns Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream with token-by-token output,
tool call progress, and completion status.

Unlike the async `/execute` endpoint which returns immediately with
an execution_id for polling, this endpoint streams all events in real-time.

Supports both:
- System skill IDs (prefixed): "skill:email-categorizer"
- Custom agent IDs (UUID): "0336a235-9417-4dd8-894c-fe81285bba75"

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of executions to return

400.description: Cannot cancel execution (already completed or failed)

get.description: Returns the step-by-step reasoning and tool calls for ReAct mode executions. Returns empty iterations array for direct mode executions.

post.description: Approves a pending tool action when execution is in waiting_approval status
Rejects a pending tool action when execution is in waiting_approval status

get.description: Reconnects to an execution's event stream after approval. Replays missed events from event log and continues streaming if execution is still running.

parameters.name: from_sequence
parameters.description: Resume from this event sequence number (for reconnection)

post.description: Initiates a streaming chat session with an AI agent. Supports server-side conversation memory via conversationId or client-provided history via clientHistory.

get.description: Lists conversations for the authenticated user, sorted by most recent.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of conversations to return

get.description: Retrieves a conversation and its message history.

parameters.name: message_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of messages to return

delete.description: Deletes a conversation and all its messages.

post.summary: Submit feedback for an assistant turn
post.description: Records a thumbs up/down (with optional comment) for the assistant turn identified by its Langfuse trace id. The rating is persisted on the message and mirrored to Langfuse as a trace score.

EpilotAuth.description: Authorization header with epilot OAuth2 bearer token. Supports RFC8725 for JWT validation.

AgentId.description:
Agent identifier. Can be either:
- System skill ID (prefixed): "skill:email-categorizer", "skill:email-labeler"
- Custom agent UUID: "0336a235-9417-4dd8-894c-fe81285bba75"

tools.description: Tool IDs this agent can use

availability.description: Where this agent/skill is available (flows, copilot, or both)

allowed_entity_schemas.description: Entity schemas this skill is allowed to work with (e.g., ["message"] for email skills)

approved_action_ids.description: For batch approval - list of action IDs to approve. If not provided, all actions are approved.

rejected_action_ids.description: For batch approval - list of action IDs to reject. Actions not in approved_action_ids are implicitly rejected.

share_scope.description: For `partnering.proposeAssignment` approvals. `primary_only` (default) shares only the primary entity; `primary_and_relations` also shares every entity in the proposal's `related_entities` as a child of the primary. Ignored by other tools.

flow_context.description: Array of entities from the flow trigger context (e.g., the message entity when triggered by email receive)

callback_url.description: Webhook URL for async completion notification

structured_output.description: Parsed structured output (only for direct mode with output_schema)

iterations.description: Slim, labels-only step-progress projection of the ReAct iterations (empty for direct mode). Exposes only index, tool, status, and timestamp — raw thought, action input, and observation are intentionally excluded.

tool.description: Tool id the iteration invoked, or null for a non-tool step

ToolPreview.description: Structured preview data for approval UI. Provides a generic format that any tool can populate.

summary.description: AI reasoning for why this action is recommended
summary.example: This email discusses solar panel installation and should be handled by the Service team.

url.description: Optional URL to view the entity

PreviewChange.description: A single field change in the preview

value.description: The actual value (type depends on "type" field)

description.description: Description for LLM to understand tool purpose

requires_approval.description: Whether this tool always requires human approval

AgentSource.description:
- system: Pre-built by epilot (system skills)
- custom: Created by organization

SkillAvailability.description:
Where the skill/agent is available:
- flows: Available in workflow automations
- copilot: Available as a sub-agent in copilot
- portals: Available in end-user self-service portals
- all: Available everywhere

ExecutionContext.description:
Where the execution was triggered from:
- flows: Triggered from workflow automation
- copilot: Triggered from copilot assistant
- api: Direct API call

ExecutionPattern.description:
- direct: Single LLM call, no tools
- react: Multi-step reasoning with tool use

ExecutionMode.description:
- automatic: Execute without human intervention
- approval: Pause for human approval before tool execution
- draft: Execute but mark output as draft for review

ParameterType.description:
Base types:
- text: Text input field
- textarea: Multi-line text input field
- number: Numeric input field
- boolean: Toggle switch
- select: Dropdown selection (requires enum array)

Custom types (domain-specific):
- entity-schema: Entity schema selector (fetches from Entity API)
- entity-attribute: Entity attribute selector (requires dependsOn)
- entity-id: Entity picker (search and select entities)
- taxonomy: Taxonomy selector (fetches from Taxonomy API)
- taxonomy-classification: Classification selector (requires dependsOn)
- shared-inbox: Shared inbox selector (fetches from Email Settings API)
- matching-criteria: Criteria editor for mapping compared fields between two contexts or entities

name.description: Unique identifier for the parameter (used in API)

dependsOn.description: Parent parameter this depends on (for entity-attribute, taxonomy-classification)

visibleWhen.description: Conditional visibility rules (show when parent has specific values)

schemaFilter.description: Filter to specific schemas (for entity-schema, entity-id)

attributeTypeFilter.description: Filter to specific attribute types (for entity-attribute)

hidden.description: Whether to hide the parameter from the UI

required.description: Array of parameter names that are required

thinking.description: Enable extended thinking/reasoning for the model

thinking_budget.description: Token budget for extended thinking (only used when thinking is enabled)

conversationId.description: Conversation ID for server-side memory. If provided, loads history from DynamoDB.

mode.description: Stream mode - updates for step-based, messages for token-based

trace_id.description: Langfuse trace id for the turn (assistant messages only)
Langfuse trace id of the assistant turn being rated
